title: The First Four: Movements to Prioritise
subtitle: Standing, walking, running & throwing — the four pillars of every human day.
excerpt: Almost everything you do reduces to four patterns. When they're well-organised, your day has less friction. When they're compensated, it shows up as pain. Here's what each one is — and how precise strength training rebuilds them.
imageAlt: Usain Bolt sprinting at the 2008 Beijing Olympics
